description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of glass for windows and balcony railings. The structure features multiple rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and layered appearance. There is a prominent outdoor swimming pool adjacent to the house, as well as a driveway with a carport and a staircase leading to an upper terrace. The property is landscaped with several trees and paved walkways, enhancing its urban residential appeal. The exterior color palette is primarily gray and white, with blue-tinted glass elements adding a contemporary touch. The house includes multiple balconies, large windows, and a spacious patio area for outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a pool, and landscaped surroundings. The design features clean lines, gray and white tones, and blue-tinted glass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, central balcony, and two trees flanking the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase to the upper terrace, pool area, and a tree near the patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, large windows, and a tree close to the house's back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, patio, and upper balcony, as well as a tree in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony railings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a flat overhang, and a minimalist door integrated into the facade
